finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_09.md:182; chapters/chapter_09.md:186; chapters/chapter_09.md:190; chapters/chapter_09.md:192; chapters/chapter_09.md:194; chapters/chapter_09.md:198
finding_results.notes: Rewrote the Petra disclosure (lines 182-202) to break the composed case-history speech into guarded, pressured exchange. Four distinct hesitation/narrowing/redirect moments now shape the telling: (1) line 182, Petra breaks off and reframes scope ('This isn't — I'm not offering this as a defense of what you're doing'); (2) line 186, she starts to take herself to task for the eleven-day delay, catches herself, and redirects ('which — ' She stopped. 'That's a separate issue.'); (3) line 190, self-correction toward clinical precision about the facility director's role ('I say forwarded. He agreed with me. He sent them with his own recommendation attached.'); (4) line 198, narrowing that defines what the conversation is not ('I'm not telling you this so you'll feel sorry for me'). Yusuf now participates via two brief responses (line 184: 'All right'; line 192: 'What happened?') that let his presence shape how the story comes out. The death fact (line 194) arrives blunt and unqualified. The aphoristic thesis line ('The protocols were wrong and he was still dead') is replaced by an indirect institutional observation ('Nobody wanted to look at whether the protocols should have existed in the first place') that is character-true for Petra's indirectness about institutional politics. Narrator commentary ('She did not hedge the next part') removed entirely. Marius Koch, Meridian's overrule, and Petra's motive for covering Yusuf all remain legible without a standalone moral diagnosis.

summary: Single finding addressed. Petra's Marius Koch disclosure rewritten from composed case-history monologue into guarded, fractured exchange with visible hesitations, self-corrections, and scope-narrowing redirects consistent with her clinical voice under pressure. Key information preserved (Marius, Meridian overrule, Petra's protective choice); aphoristic thesis lines and narrator commentary removed; Yusuf given active participation in the exchange.
